evidence.snippet: QA Systems enables organisations to accelerate safety standards compliance with automated static analysis and verification tools for embedded software.

items.notes: QA Systems makes software-based testing and static analysis tools for embedded C/C++ code. Their tools support aerospace/defense (DO-178C, JSF AV C++) among many other sectors, but there is no UXV-specific product line. 'test_and_measurement' is the closest available category — imperfect, since the taxonomy targets hardware test equipment.

evidence.snippet:
### GLOBAL HEADQUARTERS
**QA Systems GmbH
**Roggenstrasse 11
71334 Waiblingen, Germany
QA Systems enables organisations to accelerate safety standards compliance with automated static analysis and verification tools for embedded software.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: QA Systems makes embedded software testing and static analysis tools (Cantata, QA-MISRA, Astrée, AdaTEST 95) for safety-critical software across automotive, aerospace/defense, medical, railway, energy, and industrial sectors. DO-178C and JSF AV C++ support indicate aerospace involvement, but there is no UXV-specific product line and zero drone/UAS mentions in the entire corpus.

readiness.notes: QA Systems sells commercial software tool licenses with trial downloads; products are fully catalogued with datasheets.

unresolved_questions: QA Systems has no UXV-specific products or content; inclusion in this UXV vendor database may be a false positive.
tagline: Static analysis and automated testing tools (Cantata, Astrée, QA-MISRA, AdaTEST 95) for C/C++ and Ada embedded software, targeting safety-critical sectors including aerospace/defense. Germany-based, production-ready, positioned for ISO 26262, IEC 61508, DO-178C compliance. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; no major US defense program wins documented in public sources.
